message:
feat(tui): refine thread detail narrative with semantic styling (br-1xt0m.1.9.4)

Improve thread detail pane for faster comprehension and action:
- Header uses styled spans: meta-styled labels, bold thread ID,
  accent-styled unread count, hint-styled timestamps
- Mode indicator shows styled keybind hints (Tab to switch)
- "Load older" action shows styled key hint (o)
- Preview importance badges styled: warning for HIGH, critical for
  URGENT, accent for @ACK indicator
- Subject line uses "Subject:" label with meta/primary styling
- Pipe delimiters replaced with semantic spacing
- Update 2 existing tests for new label format
- Add test: detail_header_styled_importance_badges

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
